## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing Hilda Kibet for the Managing Editor role.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Experience:** Kibet managed high-volume, 24/48-hr content delivery at Real and Limited Agency, using proactive batching and Notion documentation to maintain quality under tight deadlines.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [**Critical Skill:** Identified and solved a key quality issue: content lacking strategic alignment with client business goals. This led to a process change—adding a "business goal" section to all briefs—to prevent recurrence.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [**Role Evolution:** The Managing Editor role is expanding to include end-to-end production (AI generation + editing), requiring strong editorial skills and a technical "tinkering mindset" to improve GrowthX's in-house AI tools.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [**Company Direction:** GrowthX is transitioning from a services-first agency to a tech-first platform, with plans for both a self-serve product and a hands-on service model.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Experience & Process Management

  - [**Context:** Managed high-volume, 24/48-hour content delivery at Real and Limited Agency.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [**Process:** Proactively batched client orders to create a buffer, ensuring content was with editors by the 24-hour mark.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [**Onboarding:** Used initial client feedback to refine briefs, aiming for \~100% quality from the first draft to improve efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [**Tooling:**](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
      - [**Notion:** Built templates and documentation to standardize processes for a remote team.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
      - [**Asana:** Created automations (e.g., writer → editor handoff) to streamline workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
      - [**SEMrush:** Used for SEO scoring, which was delivered to clients with the final content.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)

### Quality Control & Strategic Alignment

  - [**Problem:** New writers produced technically sound content that lacked strategic alignment with client business goals (e.g., engagement, ranking).](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [**Solution:**](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
    1.  [**Demonstrate:** Reworked a sample piece to show the "before and after" of strategic alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
    2.  [**Standardize:** Added a mandatory "business goal" section to all content briefs.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
    3.  [**Train:** Used the reworked piece as a training example for the team.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [**Origin:** This focus on strategic alignment was a direct result of critical feedback from a manager earlier in Kibet's career.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)

### GrowthX's Vision & Role Expectations

  - [**Role Evolution:** The Managing Editor role now includes end-to-end production, from AI generation to final editing.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Requires highly capable editors who need minimal oversight.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1379.0)
  - [**Company Transition:** Shifting from a services-first agency to a tech-first platform.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)
      - [**Tech Development:** Building in-house AI workflows and a new analytics platform.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
      - [**Product Vision:** Eventually offer two models: a self-serve platform and a hands-on service.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
  - [**Required Mindset:** A "tinkering mindset" is essential for providing feedback to the engineering team and iterating on AI prompts to improve tool output.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)

### Measuring Success

  - [**Primary Metric:** Client renewals.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
  - [**Client-Facing Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
      - [SERP rankings, clicks, and impressions.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
      - [LLM referrals (e.g., surfacing in Claude, ChatGPT).](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [**Internal Goal:** Optimize production volume (e.g., 5-20 posts/week) to balance client needs with maintaining high quality.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Murilia:** Contact Hilda Kibet with a take-home assignment.](https://fathom.video/share/qm1GRZPzBWixQGTmhC4Y7h_rCp98TPdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
